Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The beach parasol is swaying in the wind...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are beach chairs next to it.[n]I'd get a sunburn if I fell asleep here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The beach parasol is swaying in the wind...[n]It's very colorful, perfect for summer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks very hot after being[n]under the summer sun...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a parasol with a refreshing color scheme.[n]It's perfect for a summertime beach trip.[n]{f 1 1}
